dimensions.articulation: very high -- clear separation, finger articulation, evenness.
dimensions.pedaling: minimal or none; focus on finger legato.
dimensions.dynamics: subtle, mainly terraced; use articulation for contrast.

dimensions.articulation: clean, balanced between legato and light staccato.
dimensions.pedaling: light half-pedal for phrasing, never muddy.
dimensions.dynamics: wide but structured; follow dynamic markings closely.
dimensions.timing: steady pulse, slight rubato only in repeats.

dimensions.pedaling: essential for legato and resonance; use half-pedal.
dimensions.articulation: flexible -- blend legato with occasional accents.
dimensions.timing: rubato as expressive tool; maintain structural integrity.

dimensions.articulation: smooth, often finger legato; avoid heavy attacks.
dimensions.timing: flexible tempo, free rubato within phrases.

dimensions.articulation: crisp attacks, ghost notes, varied touch.
dimensions.dynamics: dynamic contrast for phrasing, but often limited extremes.
often extreme (ppp-fff) or graphic symbols -- follow composer's intent.
dimensions.pedaling: may be unconventional; follow score or composer's notes.
dimensions.timing: follow composer's notation strictly even when unusual.
